notes: Wave 3 (US2 implementation) gate: T016 + T017 landed in commit c575894. The Largest Remainder Method allocator with per-layer floor=1 / ceiling=4 / total-cap=8 turned 4 of Wave 2's 16 red-bar failures green.

12 remaining failures all in test_executive_architecture_payload.py — these are Wave 4 / US3 (L3 payload schema: flow_edges, clusters) territory and will be addressed by T023-T029. They are NOT regressions.

Per_layer_floor_invariant[absent], test_callouts_deterministic, and test_superset_invariant also pass (these were not in Wave 2's failure list because they passed in Wave 2 as well, but they are critical Wave 3 invariants).
test_extract_infographic_data.py: 27/27 passed. tests/scripts/ overall: 366 passed, 12 failed (US3 expected), 1 skipped (F-130 backward-compat carve-out unchanged).

Renamed test test_executive_architecture_one_callout_per_layer -> test_executive_architecture_per_layer_ceiling_and_tie_break is included in the 27/27 pass count (it tests the new per-layer-ceiling=4 contract; the old name described the pre-F-212 behavior).
Classification rule: pre_existing[] contains tests that failed in Wave 2 baseline AND continue to fail in Wave 3 (no green-bar transition).
